violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer, ice machine, dough stretcher, floor mixer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took out of service to be washed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher in the kitchen was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC called for service during inspection. Establishment to use 3 bay sink to sanitize. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025
Inspector observed chili past the 7 day date marking. PIC disposed of item. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025
Food prep sink was observed lacking an air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025
